name: Power Group Projects Corp.
summary: Power Group Projects Corp., an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of resource properties in Canada. It primarily explores for cobalt and silver properties. The company holds interests in Smith-Cobalt Project consisting of 20 patented claims and 10 staked mineral claims covering an area of approximately 1,169.7 hectares located in Cobalt, Ontario. It also holds interest in The Ontario cobalt project consists of 14 mineral claims covering 2,944 hectares located in the Cobalt Camp, Ontario; and the Blueberry Lake property that consists of 46 claim units covering and area of approximately 800 hectares located in the Cassels Township of Ontario. The company was formerly known as Cobalt Power Group Inc. and changed its name to Power Group Projects Corp. in February 2019. Power Group Projects Corp. was incorporated in 2009 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
